requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Network Operator Integration (ICE Relectric / ARESEP)
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作与网络运营商集成（ICE Relectric / ARESEP）
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作與網絡運營商集成（ICE Relectric / ARESEP）

summary.en: Costa Rica's public EV charging network is operated primarily by ICE through its Relectric platform and by regional electricity distributors. Network-connected public chargers are expected to support OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office communication, enabling remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, and consumption reporting. ARESEP's tariff metering requirements apply to billable charging sessions; charger firmware and metering must be compatible with the billing and reporting framework used by the electricity distributor operating the site. The specific OCPP version (1.6 or 2.0.1) and any local platform API requirements should be confirmed with the relevant network operator (ICE Relectric or distributor) before procurement. EMC requirements for radiated and conducted emissions follow IEC 61000 series standards as applicable to electronic equipment operating in Costa Rica; the Ministerio de Ciencia, Innovación, Tecnología y Telecomunicaciones (MICITT) and INTECO administer applicable technical regulations.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加公共电动汽车充电网络主要由ICE通过其Relectric平台及区域供电商运营。联网公共充电桩应支持OCPP（开放充电点协议）进行后台通信，实现远程监控、故障报告、访问控制和用电报告。ARESEP的电价计量要求适用于计费充电会话；充电桩固件和计量须与运营该场地的供电商使用的计费和报告框架兼容。具体OCPP版本（1.6或2.0.1）及本地平台API要求应在采购前向相关网络运营商（ICE Relectric或供电商）确认。辐射和传导发射的EMC要求按照适用于在哥斯达黎加运行电子设备的IEC 61000系列标准执行；科学、创新、技术和电信部（MICITT）及INTECO负责管理适用技术法规。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加公共電動汽車充電網絡主要由ICE通過其Relectric平台及區域供電商運營。聯網公共充電樁應支持OCPP（開放充電點協議）進行後台通訊，實現遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制和用電報告。ARESEP的電價計量要求適用於計費充電會話；充電樁固件和計量須與運營該場地的供電商使用的計費和報告框架兼容。具體OCPP版本（1.6或2.0.1）及本地平台API要求應在採購前向相關網絡運營商（ICE Relectric或供電商）確認。輻射和傳導發射的EMC要求按照適用於在哥斯大黎加運行電子設備的IEC 61000系列標準執行；科學、創新、技術和電信部（MICITT）及INTECO負責管理適用技術法規。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) v1.6 / v2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
ARESEP tariff metering and billing framework (aresep.go.cr)
MICITT (micitt.go.cr) / INTECO (inteco.or.cr) — EMC and radio technical regulations in Costa Rica

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used with CCS1 in the Americas. China AC charger back-office protocols vary by operator; some China-market chargers support OCPP for back-office management, but the underlying connector and signaling stack for AC still uses GB/T CC/CP rather than the J1772 CP signaling required for the Americas. Exporters of China-made chargers with OCPP support for the back office must still replace the DC communication stack (GB/T 27930 → IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118) for CCS1 DC installations.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或美洲CCS1所用的CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩后台协议因运营商而异；部分中国市场充电桩支持OCPP后台管理，但交流底层接口和信号栈仍使用GB/T CC/CP，而非美洲所需的J1772 CP信号。具有OCPP后台支持的中国制造充电桩出口商，仍须针对CCS1直流安装将直流通信栈从GB/T 27930替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或美洲CCS1所用的CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁後台協議因運營商而異；部分中國市場充電樁支持OCPP後台管理，但交流底層接口和信號棧仍使用GB/T CC/CP，而非美洲所需的J1772 CP信號。具有OCPP後台支持的中國製造充電樁出口商，仍須針對CCS1直流安裝將直流通訊棧從GB/T 27930替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports the OCPP version required by ICE Relectric or the relevant distributor (confirm version 1.6 or 2.0.1 and any local API extensions); (2) ARESEP-compliant metering and billing data output is implemented; (3) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack for CCS1 DC fast chargers; (4) EMC compliance (IEC 61000 series conducted and radiated emissions) is demonstrated for Costa Rica's regulatory framework and filed with INTECO / MICITT as required; (5) remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and load-management functions meet the network operator's platform requirements. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no confirmed OCPP back-office implementation cannot be activated on Costa Rica's public ICE Relectric network.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持ICE Relectric或相关供电商所要求的OCPP版本（确认1.6版或2.0.1版及本地API扩展）；(2) 实现符合ARESEP要求的计量和计费数据输出；(3) CCS1直流快充桩将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(4) EMC合规（IEC 61000系列传导和辐射发射）在哥斯达黎加监管框架下得到证明，并按要求向INTECO / MICITT备案；(5) 远程监控、故障报告和负载管理功能满足网络运营商平台要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且未确认OCPP后台实现的充电桩，无法在哥斯达黎加ICE Relectric公共充电网络上激活。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持ICE Relectric或相關供電商所要求的OCPP版本（確認1.6版或2.0.1版及本地API擴展）；(2) 實現符合ARESEP要求的計量和計費數據輸出；(3) CCS1直流快充樁將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(4) EMC合規（IEC 61000系列傳導和輻射發射）在哥斯大黎加監管框架下得到證明，並按要求向INTECO / MICITT備案；(5) 遠程監控、故障報告和負載管理功能滿足網絡運營商平台要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且未確認OCPP後台實現的充電樁，無法在哥斯大黎加ICE Relectric公共充電網絡上激活。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for public chargers connecting to ICE Relectric or distributor networks — OCPP integration, ARESEP-compliant metering, and EMC compliance are conditions of network activation and ARESEP regulatory compliance; confirm OCPP version and API with ICE Relectric before procurement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for Costa Rica network operator platform integration

source.publisher: ICE — Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad (Relectric EV charging network)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration with ICE Relectric or the relevant distributor platform is a site-activation requirement for public chargers in Costa Rica, not an optional feature. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot be activated on Costa Rica's public network without firmware and communication-stack redesign. Confirm OCPP version, metering requirements, and EMC filing requirements with ICE Relectric / ARESEP / MICITT before procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与ICE Relectric或相关供电商平台的OCPP后台集成是哥斯达黎加公共充电桩站点激活的必要条件，而非可选功能。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩，在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法在哥斯达黎加公共网络上激活。在采购前应向ICE Relectric / ARESEP / MICITT确认OCPP版本、计量要求和EMC备案要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與ICE Relectric或相關供電商平台的OCPP後台集成是哥斯大黎加公共充電樁站點激活的必要條件，而非可選功能。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁，在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法在哥斯大黎加公共網絡上激活。在採購前應向ICE Relectric / ARESEP / MICITT確認OCPP版本、計量要求和EMC備案要求。
